purpose: CAS rootless-availability gate for a third nonlinear relation family (R10 transfer breadth), run BEFORE committing to transfer-matrix runs.
bar: menu-fillability: build_menu (K=4) needs >=3 CAS-certified-unsolvable distractors per gold, drawn from the family support; theorem-grade = cas_no_real_roots. Calibrated against shipped families vieta/quad_link on the identical measurement.

sq_sum_xy.note: richer certified-distractor pool than shipped quad_link; menu-fillable at the shipped 100% floor.

hyperbolic.note: indefinite form does not force rootlessness (hyperbola has real points for any RHS) - same failure mode as the rejected linear defining relation; only 62% of golds fill a K=4 menu.

conclusion: sq_sum_xy (perfect-square, one-sided) is the viable third family and is the one to carry into the 6-cell transfer matrix. hyperbolic (indefinite) is confirmed infeasible, reinforcing the module's 'one-sided quadratic forms only' rationale.
